title: Regulatory targets and basic principles for implementing KKS
summary: KKS is directed to prevent and deal with the impact of cyber attacks, improve cyber risk management, and strengthen supervision and collaboration.
analogy: Sama kayak fondasi dan blueprint sebelum bangun gedung pencakar langit. If there is no blueprint, the building will easily collapse.
focus: Determine KKS strengthening targets that are in line with the organizer's goals and Bank Indonesia's goals.
Emphasize clarity of roles and responsibilities, comprehensive strategy, integration of enterprise risk management, KKS culture, and readiness to face incidents.
Translate basic principles into consistent policies, procedures and supervisory forums.
evidence: KKS program target document or security strategy charter.
Cross-unit role and responsibility matrix.
Management committee minutes on the direction of KKS implementation.
reporting: Pelaporan status kesiapan prinsip dasar dalam laporan tahunan KKS.

roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Block unauthorized connections and perform regular access monitoring.
roleTranslations.board: Board Mode: Ensure that PBI 022024 is the main reference in the annual audit.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare accountability documents for OJK reports.
roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Setting objectives and basic principles of PSC implementation'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

title: Objects of regulation and scope of KKS
summary: KKS regulations apply to PJP, PIP, PUVA actors, supporting institutions, KUPVA BB organizers, and other parties regulated and supervised by Bank Indonesia.
analogy: Kayak masang patok batas tanah sertifikat. So that it is clear which areas must be guarded by security guards, which are public areas.
focus: Ensure that the entity understands whether it is included in the objects of Bank Indonesia's KKS regulations.
Map the scope of implementation in the areas of governance, prevention, handling, supervision and collaboration.
Determine the scope of systems, services and third parties included in the KKS perimeter.
evidence: Document determining the KKS scope and system perimeter.
Map of business processes, services, and third parties covered.
Management decisions regarding classification of entities or service lines.
reporting: Dokumentasi perimeter sistem dalam profil risiko tahunan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over the 'Object of regulation and scope of PSC'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS setting objects and scope'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Object of regulation and scope of PSC'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: KKS strategy and policies
summary: KKS strategies and policies must include strategic plans, policies/standards/procedures, and KKS organizational functions.
focus: Establish a formal KKS strategy and policy framework.
Link KKS strategy with business goals, risks and capability strengthening priorities.
Ensure strategies and policies are implemented to strengthen the organization's KKS conditions.
evidence: Approved KKS strategy and policy documents.
Implementation roadmap or annual KKS work program.
Implementation status reporting mechanism to management.
analogy: This is the organization's compass and roadmap. If it weren't there, the ship would just wander around in the ocean without direction.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'KKS strategy and policies'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS strategies and policies'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'KKS strategy and policies'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: KKS strategic plan
summary: The KKS strategic plan at least contains strategic direction, a strengthening roadmap, and estimates of human resource, process and technology needs.
focus: Determine the strategic direction for strengthening KKS over a multi-year horizon.
Develop a roadmap and resource requirements for people, processes and technology.
Conduct regular evaluations of strategic plans according to cyber risk developments.
evidence: KKS roadmap document and supporting business case.
Plan budget needs, human resource capacity and technology.
Results of regular reviews of roadmap achievements.
analogy: It's like putting together a long-term holiday itinerary. You've planned when to go to the mountains, when to go to the beach, plus the budget.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of the 'KKS strategic plan'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize the 'KKS strategic plan'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'KKS strategic plan'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: KKS policies, standards and procedures
summary: KKS policies must cover data security, application systems, IT infrastructure, third party security, as well as consumer protection and fraud management.
focus: Regulate KKS policies on human, process and technology aspects.
Ensure the scope of the policy covers data, applications, infrastructure, third parties and fraud.
Conduct regular evaluations of the adequacy and effectiveness of policies and procedures.
evidence: Collection of information security policies, standards and SOPs.
Due diligence controls and third party safeguards.
Results of policy reviews and document updates.
analogy: Like a recipe book and SOP in a five-star restaurant kitchen. All chefs must cook to the same standards so that the taste is consistent.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'KKS policies, standards and procedures'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS policies, standards and procedures'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'KKS policies, standards and procedures'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: KKS organizational and management functions
summary: KKS organizational functions include KKS management, cyber risk management, and KKS audit, with accountability to the highest management.
focus: Establish effective, efficient and accountable KKS organizational functions.
Placing KKS management as the person responsible for planning, policy, culture, prevention and handling.
Ensure that KKS function reporting lines lead to the highest management.
evidence: Organizational structure and job description of KKS functions.
Organizational charter or mandate of KKS functions.
Periodic reports from KKS management to the highest management.
analogy: Similar to the distribution of positions on a football team. There must be a striker, defender and goalkeeper. Not everyone can attack.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over the 'Organizational and management functions of PSC'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS organization and management functions'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Organizational and management functions of PSC'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Cyber ​​risk management and KKS maturity measurement
summary: Cyber ​​risk management must follow best practices, be integrated with risk management processes, and include regular measurements of KKS maturity levels.
focus: Integrate cyber risks into enterprise risk management processes.
Carrying out cyber risk identification, assessment, mitigation and evaluation of cyber threats and attacks.
Regularly measure the KKS maturity level and follow up on the results.
evidence: Cyber ​​risk register and risk assessment methodology.
KKS assessment results or maturity assessment.
Cyber ​​risk mitigation plans and follow-up status.
analogy: Like a routine medical check-up. To test how healthy your organization is before the disease becomes chronic.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Monitor risk exposure from 'Cyber ​​risk management and KKS maturity measurement' via the executive dashboard. Make sure it is aligned with the company's risk appetite.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Cyber ​​risk management and KKS maturity measurement'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Cyber ​​risk management and PSC maturity measurement'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: KKS Audit
summary: KKS audits are carried out periodically by internal and/or external parties independently to ensure compliance and control effectiveness.
focus: Develop a KKS audit program that includes governance, prevention and handling.
Ensure that audits are carried out independently.
Follow up on audit results to improve control effectiveness.
evidence: Annual or multi-year KKS audit plan.
Internal or external audit report.
List of findings and evidence of completion of follow-up.
analogy: This is like inviting a food vlogger or critic to taste your food objectively, so that it is found to be lacking in salt or sweetness.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Ensure compliance with 'KKS Audit' is monitored in the audit report. Failure could trigger regulatory sanctions.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS Audit'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'KKS Audit'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: KKS culture
summary: KKS culture must increase awareness of cyber risks as well as positive behavior and cyber ethics for internal parties, third parties and consumers.
focus: Carrying out regular KKS culture improvement programs.
Ensure that KKS cultural materials reach internal parties, third parties and consumers.
Involving top management as role models in the KKS cultural program.
evidence: KKS awareness and culture program.
Outreach materials, training, or awareness campaigns.
Records participation and evaluates the effectiveness of cultural programs.
analogy: Just like the culture of washing hands before eating. If it becomes a habit, you don't need to be told anymore, everyone will automatically care about cleanliness.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'KKS Culture'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS Culture'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'KKS Culture'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Preparation and updating of cyber risk profiles
summary: Preventive identification starts from preparing a cyber risk profile through identification, assessment and analysis of business impacts, as well as regular updates.
focus: Compile a cyber risk profile that describes the organization's threats, vulnerabilities and exposures.
Regularly update the cyber risk profile according to changes in services or threats.
Using identification results for control prioritization.
evidence: Cyber ​​risk profile or cyber risk profile document.
Schedule regular reviews of cyber risk profiles.
Control priority mapping based on identification results.
analogy: Like making an ID card or medical record specifically for threats. So you know what your specific weaknesses are, for example ransomware allergies.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Monitor risk exposure from 'Creating and updating cyber risk profiles' via the executive dashboard. Make sure it is aligned with the company's risk appetite.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy document/SOP for 'Creation and updating of cyber risk profiles'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Cyber ​​risk assessment
summary: Cyber ​​risk assessments should determine relevant methodologies, assess the impact of vulnerabilities and threats, and prioritize mitigations from highest to lowest.
focus: Determine cyber risk assessment methodologies relevant to service characteristics.
Assess the impact of vulnerabilities and threats to operational services.
Develop mitigation priorities based on risk level.
evidence: Documented cyber risk assessment methodology.
Risk assessment results for critical assets or services.
List of mitigation priorities and those responsible for them.
analogy: Similar to a what-if simulation before investing. Test if a worst-case scenario occurs, how much loss will be experienced.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Monitor risk exposure from 'Cyber ​​risk assessment' via executive dashboard. Make sure it is aligned with the company's risk appetite.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Cyber ​​risk assessment'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Cyber ​​risk assessment'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Analyze business impact and identify vital information infrastructure
summary: A business impact analysis should assess financial and nonfinancial impacts, criticality of business functions, and critical information systems that have a broad impact.
focus: Assess the financial, non-financial and financial system stability impacts of cyber disruptions.
Identify critical business functions and their control priorities.
Determine vital information infrastructure that has a broad impact.
evidence: Business impact analysis for critical services and systems.
List of vital information infrastructure.
Critical service recovery priority document.
analogy: Just like finding out the vital organs in the body. If your little finger is injured you can still walk, but if your heart stops, it's all over.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Business impact analysis and identification of vital information infrastructure'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Business impact analysis and identification of vital information infrastructure'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Business impact analysis and identification of vital information infrastructure'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Defense system development
summary: The KKS defense system in the human, process and technology aspects must secure internal/third parties, business processes and information system security configurations.
focus: Ensure the safety of personnel and third parties throughout the work cycle as well as education according to their role.
Effectively implement security controls for business processes.
Implementing security configurations for the information systems used.
evidence: Control onboarding, offboarding, and screening of personnel or vendors.
Baseline security configuration and hardening standards.
Notes on implementing endpoint security, patching, or network segmentation.
analogy: Like building fortress walls, moats and guard posts around the palace so that the enemy thinks twice before attacking.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Defense system construction'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Defence system development'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Securing and protecting data and information
summary: Data and information must be secured at each stage of the life cycle according to data classification and comply with personal data protection provisions.
focus: Determine data classification and security at each data life cycle.
Control access, use, storage and destruction of data securely.
Ensure compliance with personal data protection provisions.
evidence: Data classification scheme and data handling policy.
Control encryption, backup, and access control for sensitive data.
Compliance documents or assessments regarding personal data protection.
analogy: It's like putting valuables into a padded safe, plus the key is only held by the person who has the right to do so.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Security and protection of data and information'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Ensure encryption (AES-256) is running when data is at-rest & in-transit for 'Security and protection of data and information'. Schedule regular backups.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Security and protection of data and information'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Detection, monitoring and early warning systems
summary: Detection includes monitoring, analysis of results, analysis of cyber attacks, analysis of malicious code, and maintenance and testing of detection systems.
focus: Monitor logical and physical access that could potentially lead to cyber attacks.
Set threshold indicators to trigger early warning systems.
Conduct cyber vulnerability scans consistently and continuously.
evidence: Monitoring logs and security dashboard.
Definition of alert threshold and escalation rules.
Results of vulnerability scanning or vulnerability monitoring.
analogy: Like an anti-theft alarm and CCTV that is on 24 hours. When there is suspicious movement, the alarm immediately goes off.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Detection, monitoring and early warning systems'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Detection, monitoring and early warning systems'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Detection, monitoring and early warning systems'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Analysis of monitoring and testing results of detection systems
summary: Organizers must analyze monitoring results, cyberattacks, malicious or unauthorized code, and maintain and test detection systems periodically.
focus: Analyze monitoring results to identify attack patterns and anomalies.
Evaluate indicators of cyberattacks as well as malicious or unauthorized code.
Ensure the detection system is always up to date and its reliability is tested.
evidence: Alert analysis and incident triage procedures.
Results of malware analysis or unauthorized code review.
Proof of maintenance of detection tools and test results.
analogy: Just like security guards checking CCTV footage every morning. Maybe last night a cat passed by or a real thief might try.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Analysis of detection system monitoring and testing results'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Analysis of detection system monitoring and testing results'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Analysis of detection system monitoring and testing results'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Cyber ​​incident response and recovery plan
summary: The cyber incident response and recovery plan must include incident status, response, impact limitations, and a recovery plan that considers RTO and RPO.
focus: Establish documented incident status and response flow.
Develop impact limitation mechanisms and recovery plans.
Ensure the plan takes into account recovery time objectives and recovery point objectives.
evidence: Incident response plan and cyber recovery plan.
Determination of RTO and RPO for critical services.
Integrated business continuity plan document.
analogy: Like an earthquake evacuation guidebook. If there was a real earthquake, everyone would know which door to run through without panicking.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of the 'Cyber ​​incident response and recovery plan'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Cyber ​​incident response and recovery plans'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for a 'Cyber ​​incident handling and recovery plan' within the time limit according to the regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Simulation, testing and evaluation of treatment plans
summary: Simulations and trials for handling/recovering cyber incidents are carried out comprehensively and regularly, then evaluated to improve plans.
focus: Carrying out simulations and trials comprehensively and regularly.
Involve other parties if necessary in implementing the simulation.
Evaluate effectiveness and improve plans based on test results.
evidence: Simulation scenarios and exercise schedules.
Minutes, minutes, or simulation results reports.
Improvement of treatment plan after exercise evaluation.
analogy: Similar to fire drill training in an office building. So that if there is a real fire, don't rush to the emergency stairs.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Simulation, testing and evaluation of treatment plans'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Simulation, testing and evaluation of treatment plans'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Handling cyber incidents and mandatory reporting to Bank Indonesia
summary: When an incident occurs, the organizer must activate the incident response team, carry out mitigation and forensics, and report it to Bank Indonesia.
focus: Activate a cyber incident response team at the organizational level.
Submit initial notification no later than 1 hour after the incident is discovered and incident reports no later than 3 calendar days after the incident occurs.
Carry out incident deepening, impact mitigation, escalation, and handling with internal and/or external resources.
evidence: Incident response team activation runbook and emergency contact list.
Initial notification template and incident report to Bank Indonesia.
Forensic reports, incident chronology, and evidence of mitigation actions.
reporting: Pelaporan kepada Bank Indonesia mencakup notifikasi awal paling lama 1 jam setelah insiden diketahui dan laporan insiden paling lama 3 hari kalender setelah insiden terjadi.
analogy: It's like calling the police and fire department when your house is stolen or on fire. You have to report as soon as possible, you can't delay.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight over 'Cyber ​​incident handling and mandatory reporting to Bank Indonesia'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts related to 'Handling cyber incidents and mandatory reporting to Bank Indonesia'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Handling cyber incidents and mandatory reporting to Bank Indonesia' within the time limit according to regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Communication of cyber incident handling actions
summary: Incident handling must be supported by communication strategies and methods to stakeholders, including reporting progress on handling to Bank Indonesia.
focus: Develop strategies and communication methods for incident handling and recovery.
Delivering appropriate communications to stakeholders.
Communicate progress in handling incidents to Bank Indonesia.
evidence: Crisis communication plan or incident communication.
Stakeholder list and communication escalation scheme.
Proof of submitting handling updates to the regulator.
reporting: Komunikasi penanganan insiden perlu dapat menunjukkan konsistensi isi, waktu penyampaian, dan pihak penerima yang relevan.
analogy: Just like a PR company that makes a press release when there is a crisis. The information must be arranged so that customers do not panic together.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Communication of cyber incident response actions'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Communication of cyber incident handling actions' within the time limit according to regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

summary: Recovery is carried out to restore service according to priority, including the establishment of alternative work locations, separate data centers, and alternative data communications networks.

Determine alternative work location options, separate data centers, or alternative networks.
Execute recovery according to incident recovery plan and critical service priorities.

analogy: Similar to the process of sweeping up broken glass and rebuilding the roof after being hit by a tornado, until the house can be lived in again.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Recovery and return of services to normal conditions'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

title: Continuous improvement and recovery communications
summary: After an incident, organizers are required to evaluate the effectiveness of the response, strengthen the KKS, and communicate recovery progress to stakeholders and Bank Indonesia.
focus: Evaluate the effectiveness of incident handling and recovery.
Implement efforts to strengthen KKS to mitigate similar incidents.
Communicate incident recovery progress to relevant parties and Bank Indonesia.
evidence: Post-incident review or lessons learned report.
List of corrective actions and their implementation status.
Evidence of recovery communication to regulators and stakeholders.
reporting: Pelaporan kemajuan pemulihan ke Bank Indonesia perlu selaras dengan strategi komunikasi insiden dan menunjukkan progres pengembalian layanan.
analogy: It's like treating wounds and then patching holes in the road that cause you to fall. So that tomorrow no one will slip in the same place again.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Continuous improvement and recovery communications'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

title: Bank Indonesia supervision mechanism
summary: Bank Indonesia carries out risk and/or compliance-based supervision through indirect supervision, direct supervision and follow-up supervision.
focus: Prepare the organization for direct and indirect supervision.
Ensure documents, infrastructure, information systems and other objects are ready for inspection.
Following up on regulators' requests to do or not do something, including restrictions on activities or services.
evidence: Repository of documents and evidence of KKS implementation.
Regulatory inspection preparation procedures.

summary: Organizers are required to submit data and information on KKS implementation in the areas of governance, prevention and handling through annual and incidental reporting.

Submit annual reporting on KKS maturity levels and identification of vital information infrastructure.

title: Exchange of information on threats, vulnerabilities and cyber incidents
summary: The organizers exchange information resulting from identifying vulnerabilities, threats, attacks and cyber incidents that could disrupt the stability of the financial system.
focus: Share information on sources and patterns of cyber threats and attacks.
Convey information on security gaps that impact cyber vulnerabilities.
Document lessons learned from how cyber incidents are handled.

Controlled incident learning summaries are shared.

summary: Collaboration includes coordination of incident prevention and the effects of transmission, cross-party handling readiness, as well as possible technical procedures through SRO.

Prepare participation in simulations or coordinate incident handling readiness.
Refers to technical and specific KKS procedures that can be prepared through SRO with approval from Bank Indonesia.

Participation in financial sector cyber attack simulations.
Technical procedures or operational standards referred to from the SRO.

reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Incident prevention coordination and collaboration with SROs'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Coordination of incident prevention and cooperation with SRO'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Coordination of incident prevention and cooperation with SRO' within the time limit according to regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Implementation of KKS according to organizer classification
summary: The implementation of KKS must adapt to the classification of providers, including classification references for PJP, PIP, PUVA, supporting institutions and other parties determined by Bank Indonesia.
focus: Identify the classification of organizers according to applicable regulations.
Adjusting the intensity and form of KKS implementation with the risk profile or infrastructure classification.
Ensure internal policies refer to relevant classification and derivative provisions.
evidence: Organizer classification determination document.
KKS control mapping based on classification or risk tier.
Compliance matrix for relevant derivative provisions.
analogy: Like the boxing class classification. You must fight in a class that matches your weight. The rules are adjusted to capacity.
reporting: Pelaporan berkala kepada manajemen dan Bank Indonesia sesuai ketentuan.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Implementation of KKS according to provider classification'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'KKS implementation according to provider classification'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Implementation of KKS according to provider classification'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
